title: Patience, Firmness, and Help
summary: The Quranic dua of believers asking Allah for poured patience, firm feet, and help against disbelief.
repeat_guidance: No fixed repetition count is attached in this entry.

supplications.arabic: رَبَّنَا أَفْرِغْ عَلَيْنَا صَبْرًا وَثَبِّتْ أَقْدَامَنَا وَانصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
supplications.transliteration: Rabbana afrigh alayna sabran, wa thabbit aqdamana, wansurna alal-qawmil-kafirin.
supplications.translation: Our Lord, pour upon us patience, make firm our feet, and grant us help against the disbelieving people.
